title: pieris japonica subsp. formosa
intro: Pieris japonica subsp. formosa, also known as Japanese Andromeda or Formosa Andromeda, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This evergreen shrub is native to Taiwan and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pieris japonica subsp. formosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and protect against cardiovascular disease. In traditional medicine, the leaves and flowers are often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to promote digestive health and reduce stress.
